baseline.claim: baseline reached verified preview in 1000ms with 1/1 qualifying workers

fleet.claim: fleet reached verified preview in 100ms with 2/2 qualifying workers

comparison.claim: fleet reached an equivalent verified preview 10.00x faster than baseline

mutations.name: advertised workers must match receipts
mutations.observed: worker conservation: advertised count differs from spawned receipts

mutations.name: scripts cannot count as model workers
mutations.observed: worker qualification: deterministic script counted as model worker

mutations.name: omitted terminal worker rejected
mutations.expected: every spawn needs one terminal receipt
mutations.observed: worker conservation: every spawn needs one terminal receipt

mutations.name: timed-out worker cannot count as qualifying
mutations.expected: advertised count differs from qualifying receipts
mutations.observed: worker qualification: advertised count differs from qualifying receipts

mutations.name: hidden human product write rejected
mutations.observed: measurement contamination: hidden human product write

mutations.name: undispositioned commit rejected
mutations.observed: commit conservation: produced commit missing final disposition

mutations.name: accepted behavior loss rejected
mutations.observed: behavior conservation: accepted behavior silently lost

mutations.name: unresolved collision rejected
mutations.observed: collision conservation: collision has no resolution

mutations.name: proof digest mismatch rejected
mutations.observed: proof binding: proof does not admit candidate source-tree digest

mutations.name: missing preview rejected
mutations.observed: preview.verified: expected exactly one event, got 0

mutations.name: completion before proof rejected
mutations.observed: completion time: clock stopped before proof and preview verification

mutations.name: completion after proof but before preview rejected
mutations.expected: clock stopped before proof and preview
mutations.observed: completion time: clock stopped before proof and preview verification

mutations.name: omitted retry accounting rejected
mutations.observed: resource accounting: retry or compute totals omitted

mutations.name: receipt prose cannot drift from events
mutations.observed: receipt integrity: claim or derived values differ from events

limits: The control ledger is synthetic; no model fleet is claimed.
The first mutation corpus is necessary but not complete.
Local preview evidence does not prove a Cloudflare deployment.
